description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a minimalist design, featuring a flat, light gray tabletop supported by a slender metal frame. The desk includes two spacious drawers, both finished in a light blue color, which are integrated seamlessly beneath the tabletop and can be pulled out for storage. The frame is constructed from thin, straight metal legs connected by a horizontal support bar for added stability. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, with clean lines and a contemporary aesthetic. The drawers are the only visible interactive components, and their color provides a striking contrast to the otherwise neutral palette. The desk is designed to accommodate typical office or study activities, offering ample workspace and storage.
description: A modern, light gray desk with two blue pull-out drawers and a slim metal frame, offering a clean and functional workspace.
description_view_0: Front view showing both blue drawers partially open beneath the flat gray tabletop and the supporting metal frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the left drawer and the thin profile of the tabletop and frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid gray back of the desk with no visible drawers or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the right drawer extended and the desk's slim construction.
attribute_orientation: The side with the two blue drawers is intended to face the user, providing access to storage and workspace, while the solid gray side is the back.
